name: 0-1 BFS (Deque BFS)
description: Find shortest paths in a graph with 0 or 1 edge weights using a double-ended queue.
intuition: Extend BFS with a deque: 0-weight edges push the neighbour to the front (free move), 1-weight edges push to the back (costs one step). This maintains the invariant that all nodes in the deque have distance d or d+1.
